inputs.funnel_data: Stage 1 - Awareness: 4,200 website visitors. Stage 2 - Interest: 380 resource downloads (9.0 percent). Stage 3 - Consideration: 85 demo requests (22.4 percent). Stage 4 - Evaluation: 42 demos completed (49.4 percent). Stage 5 - Decision: 28 proposals sent (66.7 percent). Stage 6 - Close: 11 deals won (39.3 percent). Total revenue: $127,500. Period: March 2026. Notable: demo-to-proposal drop is 17 percent worse than February.
